svg.text: What Claude built well — keep as-is

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the panelDef factory function works in ControlRoomKnights')
sendPrompt('How does the extractVotesAndStrengths function work?')
sendPrompt('How does the polling and countdown system work in the control room?')
sendPrompt('How does the heatColor and voteGlow function work for visual feedback?')
sendPrompt('Explain the JediOrb and XOrb SVG components in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the WarriorMobileSyncContext work with the control room?')
sendPrompt('How do I fix the score threshold magic numbers in ControlRoomKnights? score >= 7 and score <= -7')
sendPrompt('How do I memoize the bank vote calculations in React to avoid recalculation on every render?')
sendPrompt('How do I fix the doFetch useCallback dependency on pollInterval causing unnecessary re-renders?')
sendPrompt('How do I fix the DetailPanel using position fixed which breaks in iframe and mobile contexts?')
sendPrompt('How do I add WebSocket support to replace polling in ControlRoomKnights?')
sendPrompt('How do I add error boundary and loading skeleton to ControlRoomKnights for better UX?')

svg.text: Orb upgrades — the 4 around Claude center

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Build me an upgraded JediOrb with animated arc rings and score gradient fill for the MaxCogViz control room')
sendPrompt('Build a live price action orb component showing candlestick mini-chart and VWAP for ControlRoomKnights')
sendPrompt('Build a live risk orb showing P&L, max drawdown and position size for the ControlRoomKnights dashboard')
sendPrompt('Build a signal confluence orb that scores agreement across Bank A, B, C algos with a radial gauge')
sendPrompt('Build a volume and order flow orb showing delta, cumulative delta and absorption for ControlRoomKnights')
sendPrompt('How do I wire up TradingView webhooks to feed live data into the ControlRoomKnights algo_day.json endpoint?')
sendPrompt('Write the WebSocket hook to replace HTTP polling in ControlRoomKnights using Alpaca market data stream')
sendPrompt('How do I handle WebSocket reconnection and heartbeat in a React hook for live trading data?')
sendPrompt('How do I update ControlRoomKnights vote state from a WebSocket message in real time without polling?')

svg.text: Banks A/B/C separation, panelDef factory, context bridge
Heat system, glow, chevron towers, arc gauge
Missing useMemo on bank calcs, doFetch dep loop
Polling only, no WS, no error UI, static fallback good
isNarrow breakpoint, touch targets, shell sync
